old_value: {"id":"wr-dun","title":"Organize and document project artifacts","description":"Systematically organize the various PDF, XLSX, and text documents in the root and subdirectories. This includes documents in eric-golemo-package-2026-02-13, ecology-response, and wandering-river-lupa.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T21:13:01Z","created_by":"wandering_river/crew/batsquatch","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:13:01Z"}

old_value: {"id":"wr-9fq","title":"Analyze County's Motion to Dismiss (LUPA Appeal)","description":"Analyze the recently received scanned filings from Cowlitz County, primarily focusing on the Motion to Dismiss for Insufficiency of Service and Lack of Jurisdiction (IRISH_CWLTZ MTN DSMSS.md). The county alleges improper service of process. We need to summarize the arguments, review the supporting declarations (Fundingsland, Miller, Trimble), analyze the cited statutes/case law, and strategize the next steps or possible responses.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T21:36:06Z","created_by":"wandering_river/crew/batsquatch","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:36:06Z"}

new_value: Analyzed the County's Motion to Dismiss and created a detailed report in wandering-river-lupa/02_internal_working_docs/2026-03-11_motions/COUNTY_MTN_DSMSS_ANALYSIS.md

old_value: {"id":"wr-9xv","title":"Draft and File Stipulated Order of Dismissal for LUPA Appeal","description":"The LUPA appeal (No. 26-2-00111-08) is fatally flawed due to improper service. We need to draft an email to the Cowlitz County Prosecutor conceding the motion to dismiss and proposing a Stipulated Order of Dismissal. This will prevent the County from seeking attorney's fees at the March 11 hearing. The task includes drafting the email to Douglas Jensen and preparing the Stipulated Order document.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T21:51:42Z","created_by":"wandering_river/crew/batsquatch","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:51:42Z"}

new_value: Drafted email to County Prosecutor conceding motion to dismiss and requesting a Stipulated Order to avoid hearing and attorney fees.

old_value: {"id":"wr-a48","title":"Analyze Ecology Email Chain (Feb/Mar 2026)","description":"Review the email chain between Jeremy Irish, Andrea Aberle (consultant), and Casey Vaughn (Ecology). Ecology denied a further extension past Feb 27 and states they are moving forward with a decision based on the 'partial response' submitted late last week. We need to analyze what this means for the Shoreline permit, what information was submitted vs. missing, and strategize the next steps given the impending dismissal of the LUPA appeal.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:02:30Z","created_by":"wandering_river/crew/batsquatch","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:02:30Z"}

new_value: Analyzed the Feb/Mar Ecology email chain. The project is effectively dead due to the unresolved conflict over public access and Ecology's refusal to grant further extensions. Prepared an analysis document for the user outlining the inevitable denial and the necessity of starting over.

old_value: {"id":"wr-d4c","title":"Project Wind-down: Withdraw Permits and Stop Work","description":"Officially withdraw the Shoreline Substantial Development Permit (SSDP 24-1040) and Campground Binding Site Plan (BSP 24-35.01) from Cowlitz County and the Department of Ecology. Direct consultants (Andrea Aberle/Ash Eco Solutions) to stop all work and provide a final invoice. This epic marks the end of the current project iteration.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:30Z","created_by":"wandering_river/crew/batsquatch","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:10:30Z"}
